## ScreenShotPP v0.3.1-rc.2

Second release candidate for the Windows delayed-capture fixes.

### Fixes since rc.1 (to verify)

- Countdown number now updates (was stuck at 3): the countdown window was missing
  event permissions, so it never received the tick updates. It now has its own
  capability.
- Removed the blurry rectangle under the countdown bubble (dropped the CSS
  drop-shadow and the native window shadow).

rc.1 already fixed the Windows freeze on delayed capture.

Please test on Windows (Ctrl+Shift+3): no freeze, the countdown visibly counts
3 → 2 → 1 and follows the cursor, no blurry rectangle under the bubble, Escape
cancels, and the capture/overlay opens at the end.
